title: wolfhsm: key handles leak cache slots on error paths (no Drop eviction)
description: Every HSM key type (EccP256Key, Ed25519Key, RsaKey, Curve25519Key) requires a manual .evict(&mut client) call. Any early return on an error path silently leaks a cache slot. The HSM key cache is finite; leaks accumulate until wh_Client_* calls fail with cache-full. Fix: introduce a KeyGuard<'_, K> type that borrows the client and the key together and calls evict in Drop.
